asset_name: Star Wars Geonosis Arena Low Poly Environment
author: Environment Pack Studios
usage_notes: Low-poly Geonosis desert terrain with iconic rock formations. Red/orange sandy dunes with rust-colored rock outcrops. Includes arena-like structure suitable for battle scenarios. Optimized for real-time rendering with baked lighting.
special_notes: Complete modular arena environment suitable for clone-vs-droid battles
Red/orange sand with rock formations - iconic Geonosis aesthetic
Polycount budget allows use as primary battle terrain
Includes layered geology for visual depth
Modular design allows sectioning for gameplay zones

steps: Click the Download button (requires free Sketchfab account)
Select GLB format (recommended for Unity import)
Save as source_download.glb in this directory
Run: dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- ingest assets raw/sw_geonosis_env_sketchfab_001

asset_manifest.json.description: This file - metadata and provenance record

discovery_notes: Discovered via Sketchfab search: 'Geonosis Star Wars environment'
Score: 9.1/10 - Excellent thematic match, reasonable polycount for terrain, CC-BY license
Can serve as base terrain for multiple Clone Wars scenarios
